scripts.build:backend: npm run build:server && npm run build:agent && npm run build:tgbot
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:dashboard
scripts.dev:backend: concurrently --names "server,agent,tgbot" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:tgbot"
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "server,agent,tgbot,dashboard" --prefix-colors "blue,green,yellow,magenta" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:agent" "npm run dev:tgbot" "npm run dev:dashboard"
